now.title: Current Role / Now
now.intro: Founder & CEO — FlowMind Studio LLC (Austin, TX). I design and build premium artistic websites that merge creative direction, engineering, and business growth.
now.description: I lead strategy, execution, and systems: conversion websites, ad landing pages, Google Business Profile optimization, technical performance, CRO, and lightweight automations for lead handling and follow-up.

positioning.title: CEO Positioning Blueprint
positioning.intro: A premium personal-brand structure that looks elite while staying 100% real and evidence-based.

pillars.title: Four pillars to look top-tier
items: Authority statement: one sentence defining who you help, how, and the measurable result.
Proof wall: selected wins with context, numbers, and your exact role in each outcome.
CEO narrative: concise timeline from operator → strategist → founder.
Power CTA: direct booking flow for strategy calls, partnerships, or key opportunities.

launch.title: Launch in 7 days
items: Day 1–2: sharpen your positioning message and headline.
Day 3–4: turn your best projects into business-ready case studies.
Day 5: build a premium media kit + downloadable one-page CV.
Day 6–7: publish, connect analytics, and start posting proof-driven content.

items.body: Lead strategy, development, design direction, local SEO systems, and conversion-focused implementation for local business clients.
Hands-on track record across delivery, process optimization, client execution, and growth systems in digital environments.

items.title: Continuous self-directed specialization

items.title: Portfolio-based capability proof
items.body: Real-world project delivery and measurable outcomes as primary credibility signals.
